# Showcase (source folder)

The Showcase section renders at https://product-on-purpose.github.io/pm-skills/showcase/.

**This README is the GitHub directory landing page.** The canonical user-facing overview lives in [`index.mdx`](index.mdx), which is auto-generated by `scripts/generate-showcase.py` and renders on the docs site at `/showcase/`. Per-thread narrative pages (storevine.md, brainshelf.md, workbench.md) are also generator output. To edit thread definitions or sample selections, update `scripts/generate-showcase.py` and re-run the generator.
